phase_name: Measure nx whole-package sweep auto-trigger on HEAD (close the Phase-12 WARNING)

The ONLY loose end is one non-blocking WARNING from 12-VALIDATION/12-VERIFICATION: the nx whole-package sweep auto-trigger was measured PRE-revert (p8 3/3, fleet 8/8) against the broadened 12-02 description that was later REVERTED (9832c74). This handoff sets up a fresh session to DIRECTLY measure the nx sweep auto-trigger on HEAD, converting inferred -> measured.

blockers.description: Metered claude -p apply runs are user-gated + session-cap-fragile. Honor eval-run-approval-gate: halt for explicit approval before spend; run in background; idempotent resume.

git reset --hard / destructive git on nx is classifier-gated (needs the user to name the target). The runner's per-run reset --hard to applyBase is an internal spawnSync child (not gated); only manual resets need approval.

decisions.decision: Measure the nx sweep auto-trigger in APPLY mode with the with_skill arm, NOT recommend or invoke_skill.
decisions.rationale: Phase-12 finding: whole-package sweep prompts auto-trigger in APPLY/directive framing (3/3) but NOT in recommend (0/6); invoke_skill FORCES activation so it cannot measure auto-trigger. with_skill apply on the directive prompt is the faithful auto-trigger measure.

decisions.decision: Do NOT re-run no_skill for p8/p7/fleet.
decisions.rationale: They are existing prompts (user rule: only run no_skill for NEW prompts); and auto-trigger has no meaning for no_skill (no skill loaded).

decisions.decision: The runner reads the live skill via --plugin-dir from the repo tree = HEAD (241c1fb description + 9832c74 revert + 98cf482 L1), so no reload is needed for the runner; the user's /reload-plugins covers interactive use.
decisions.rationale: --plugin-dir points at plugins/lz-tdd on disk at HEAD.
